CPHM-TC-062.caseCanon: {"id":"CPHM-TC-062","title":"Plugin in the separate repo builds resolving @roubo/plugin-sdk from the registry","level":"1","preconditions":["@roubo/plugin-sdk is published to the registry at a pinned version","A plugin project is set up outside the Roubo monorepo workspace (a sandbox project that consumes the published SDK)","The plugin's package.json depends on @roubo/plugin-sdk by pinned version, not by a file: workspace ref"],"steps":[{"id":"S001","instruction":"Run a clean install of dependencies in the separate plugin repo","observations":[{"id":"S001-O01","expected":"@roubo/plugin-sdk is fetched from the registry at the pinned version"},{"id":"S001-O02","expected":"Install completes with no unresolved file:/workspace references"}]},{"id":"S002","instruction":"Grep the plugin's package.json and lockfile for file: refs to @roubo packages","observations":[{"id":"S002-O01","expected":"No file: or workspace: dependency on @roubo/plugin-sdk is present"}]},{"id":"S003","instruction":"Run the plugin build (tsup) in the separate repo","observations":[{"id":"S003-O01","expected":"Build succeeds with exit code 0"},{"id":"S003-O02","expected":"dist/index.js is produced"}]}]}

CPHM-TC-063.caseCanon: {"id":"CPHM-TC-063","title":"Integration plugin resolves @roubo/shared and @roubo/shared-github and bundles a self-contained dist","level":"2","preconditions":["@roubo/shared and @roubo/shared-github are published to the registry at pinned versions","An integration plugin built outside the Roubo monorepo workspace depends on @roubo/plugin-sdk, @roubo/shared, and @roubo/shared-github by pinned version"],"steps":[{"id":"S001","instruction":"Run a clean install in the integration plugin project","observations":[{"id":"S001-O01","expected":"@roubo/shared and @roubo/shared-github resolve from the registry at their pinned versions"}]},{"id":"S002","instruction":"Run the tsup build for the integration plugin","observations":[{"id":"S002-O01","expected":"Build succeeds and emits dist/index.js"},{"id":"S002-O02","expected":"tsup bundles @roubo/shared and @roubo/shared-github into dist/index.js"}]},{"id":"S003","instruction":"Inspect the built plugin's published package.json dependencies field","observations":[{"id":"S003-O01","expected":"dist/index.js declares no runtime dependencies (the bundle is self-contained)"}]},{"id":"S004","instruction":"Load dist/index.js in a host with no @roubo packages installed at runtime","observations":[{"id":"S004-O01","expected":"The plugin loads and its integration entrypoint runs without a missing-module error"}]}]}
